instances.task_instruction:
You are solving a grocery shopping task. Fill the 5x2 grid with product ids.
This grocery shopping plan has 5 shopping days as rows and 2 item slots to fill per day as columns.
Each cell must use exactly one candidate id from that slot.

Across the whole grid, the plan must satisfy these global constraints:
(1) the total price of all products in the whole grid must be at most 191.
(2) the total calories of all products in the whole grid must be at least 4906.
(3) the total protein of all products in the whole grid must be at least 213.
(4) the same brand can appear at most 5 times in the whole grid.

For the row constraints:
For shopping day 0:
(1) the total price of all products in shopping day 0 must be at most 25.
(2) the total calories of all products in shopping day 0 must be at least 945.
(3) the total weight of all products in shopping day 0 must be at most 2661.

For shopping day 1:
(1) the total price of all products in shopping day 1 must be at most 42.
(2) the total calories of all products in shopping day 1 must be at least 1330.
(3) the total weight of all products in shopping day 1 must be at most 1561.

For shopping day 2:
(1) the total price of all products in shopping day 2 must be at most 25.
(2) the total calories of all products in shopping day 2 must be at least 933.
(3) the total weight of all products in shopping day 2 must be at most 1488.

For shopping day 3:
(1) the total price of all products in shopping day 3 must be at most 33.
(2) the total calories of all products in shopping day 3 must be at least 1036.
(3) the total weight of all products in shopping day 3 must be at most 2762.

For shopping day 4:
(1) the total price of all products in shopping day 4 must be at most 43.
(2) the total calories of all products in shopping day 4 must be at least 838.
(3) the total weight of all products in shopping day 4 must be at most 1856.

For the column constraints:
For item slot 0:
(1) the total price of all products in item slot 0 must be at most 76.
(2) the total calories of all products in item slot 0 must be at least 3011.
(3) the same category can appear at most 5 times in item slot 0.

For item slot 1:
(1) the total price of all products in item slot 1 must be at most 77.
(2) the total calories of all products in item slot 1 must be at least 2057.
(3) the same category can appear at most 1 times in item slot 1.

Each slot also has its own local constraints, but those slot-specific limits must be looked up from the dataset/database for that slot before deciding which candidate id to use.
Return only a 5x2 list of product ids.
